title: Deguelia polystachya
taxonomy: Deguelia polystachya is classified under the family Leguminosae. It belongs to the subfamily Faboideae. The genus Deguelia is a part of the tribe Dalbergieae. This plant is native to tropical Africa, specifically in countries such as Senegal, Mali, and Nigeria. The classification reflects its evolutionary relationships with other plants in the same family and genus.
uses: Deguelia polystachya has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its purported medicinal properties.
